title: Mycelium Conquest: Mitosis
description:
This is the free co-op edition of Mycelium Conquest. The full single-player and co-op experience — including coop and single player savegames, Steam achievements, and Steam Cloud — is available in the full game. See the note at the bottom of this page.

Mycelium Conquest: MitosisMycelium Conquest Mitosis is the free, co-op only edition of the biological network automation game, Mycelium Conquest. Team up with up to 3 friends and crash-land on the alien world of Xenoterris as a living fungal organism. Grow a sprawling mycelial network together, build complex production chains, and evolve with your friends from a tiny spore into a powerful entity capable of consuming the planet.

Grow or Die TogetherStart as a vulnerable nascent spore and consume alien creatures and local flora to gather biomass. Hunt, kill, and absorb everything in your path across 5 evolution stages — from a fragile organism barely surviving to a cosmic entity that consumes worlds. Divide the hunt, cover each other's flanks, and overwhelm prey no single spore could take alone.

Build Living Infrastructure TogetherConstruct biological structures to process raw resources through multi-stage production chains. Decompose organic matter, refine enzymes, and manage bottlenecks across sprawling factory complexes. Every connected player can build, so coordinate your layout, specialise your roles, and turn the wild into a living machine.

Automate Everything TogetherDesign production lines that transform basic resources into advanced materials. Optimize throughput, eliminate bottlenecks, and scale from a handful of structures to continental harvesting operations spanning vast distances. Your network grows as fast as your team can build it.

Defend Your Network TogetherYour growth attracts hostile alien creatures in escalating waves. Fight back with acidic spray attacks and build defensive structures. The bigger your network, the bigger the threats — and with friends at your side, the bigger the fights you can survive.

A note on this free editionMycelium Conquest: Mitosis is a free, cooperative multiplayer-only version of the game Mycelium Conquest, playable with up to 4 players — but the following features are not available in this edition:

• No co-op saved games — your session lives only as long as it's running. There is no autosave and no manual save.

• No Steam achievements

• No Steam Cloud

• No single-player mode — co-op requires at least one friend to start the game.

If you have enjoyed the co-op game and would like to unlock these features, kindly search for Mycelium Conquest on Steam.
description_short: A free co-op automation game where you and up to 3 friends grow a living mycelial network across an alien planet. Consume local creatures, build biological production chains, and evolve from a tiny spore into a cosmic entity together.
